label: 2023 La Vuelta Ciclista a Espana Stage 18

extraction.one_line_summary: EVENEPOEL Remco won solo from breakaway after dropping Caruso/Cron on final climb ascent, extended advantage on descent while Ayuso-Lando battled for best Spaniard
tactical_patterns: EVENEPOEL responded to CRON attack with immediate counter-acceleration that crushed psychological momentum, created 1:21 gap before final descent
VLASOV attacked alone following DENZ wheel late in stage to defend top-10, suggesting GC team support already dissolved
VINGEGAARD and ROGLIC super-domestiques paced SEPP final kilometers showing inverted hierarchy for protecting 17-second red jersey margin
AYUSO vs LANDO best-Spaniard battle reached physical sprint contest at line despite AYUSO theoretically leading team

rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: positive: dismissed CRON attack as disrespectful then immediately distanced him, showing psychological dominance translates to physical acceleration
rider_signals.CRON Andy: negative: attack on second-to-last climb was tactically premature and psychologically read/countered by EVENEPOEL instantly
rider_signals.SEPP Kuss: neutral: relied on VINGEGAARD/ROGLIC pacing in closing kilometers rather than own legs, 17-second margin indicates fragility
rider_signals.VLASOV Aleksandr: negative: reduced to solo defending GC position by following DENZ without team support, signals isolation
rider_signals.AYUSO Juan: negative: couldn't drop LANDO despite team leadership status, lost best-Spaniard battle in final sprint
rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: positive: worked as super-domestique for SEPP despite being 17 seconds down, confirms team hierarchy resolution
